reviews.comment:
La mejor ... el taller unos fenomenos tanto villareal como huguito... siempre tan amables... solucionando cualquier percanse.. el lavadero no te lo lava ... te lo pinta ... te queda perfecto... el bar muy muy bueno rica comida buena atencion...y la nafta exelente... la atencion ... gracias aca... por estar junto al consumidor...
Gracias !!!!

(Translated by Google)
The best... the workshop is fantastic, both Villareal and Huguito... always so kind... solving any problem... the car wash doesn't just wash it... it paints it... it comes out perfect... the bar is very, very good, delicious food, great service... and the gas is excellent... the service... thank you here... for being there for the consumer... Thank you!!!!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9098900885435931533/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXcDZEQXF3RRAB
